name: Big Bend National Park
exampleLocations: Big Bend National Park, Texas, USA
description: Located in a remote corner of West Texas along the Mexican border, Big Bend is one of the least light-polluted national parks in the contiguous United States. The park's remoteness — the nearest significant city is over 300 km away — produces consistently dark skies. Its southern latitude allows views of celestial objects rarely seen from northern locations, including Omega Centauri and the Southern Cross (briefly visible on the southern horizon). The park records some of the lowest measured sky brightness readings in North America.
